summary: Completed Eventfinda API integration testing for Luna Group VIP app. All 18 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend displays real-time events from Eventfinda with images from CDN. Fixed bug in get_event_by_id method where single event lookup returns event directly (not wrapped in array).
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in eventfinda_service.py get_event_by_id() - single event lookup returns event directly, not wrapped in 'events' array
Eventfinda API integration is LIVE - NOT MOCKED - using real API credentials
Events are cached for 5 minutes to respect rate limits (1 req/sec)
All event fields transform correctly: id, title, description, date, time, venue_name, location, image, category, is_free, is_featured, url, source
Event images load from Eventfinda CDN (cdn.eventfinda.com.au) with fallback to Unsplash
Date format is YYYY-MM-DD, time format is HH:MM
seed_data_creation: None - events are fetched from Eventfinda API in real-time
context_for_next_testing_agent: Eventfinda integration fully tested and working. All Events API endpoints return real-time data from Eventfinda: /api/events, /api/events/feed, /api/events/tonight, /api/events/featured, /api/events/weekend, /api/events/upcoming, /api/events/search, /api/events/{event_id}. Events have correct structure with all required fields. Images load from Eventfinda CDN. Cache TTL is 5 minutes.

get_events_brisbane.returns: Real events from Eventfinda with source='eventfinda'

get_events_gold_coast.returns: Real events from Gold Coast area

get_events_feed.returns: Categorized events: tonight, tomorrow, featured, upcoming arrays

get_tonight_events.returns: Events for today's date with date field

get_event_detail.note: Fixed bug - single event returns directly, not in array

event_structure.id_format: ef_XXXXXX (Eventfinda event ID prefixed with ef_)

features_verified: What's On section with event list

mocked_apis.Eventfinda API: NOT MOCKED - Using live API with credentials (lunagrouployaltyapp)

bug_fixed.issue: Single event lookup returns event object directly, not wrapped in 'events' array
bug_fixed.fix: Check for 'id' field first (direct response), then fallback to 'events' array check for compatibility
